Home / Certifications & Licenses

Certifications &
Professional Licenses

Verified credentials, compliance standards, and industry certifications that back every project we deliver.

View credentials Request verification
Commitment

Excellence you can verify with confidence

Global Modular Partners invests in certifications, registrations, and state licensing so procurement officers, compliance teams, and partners can move forward with confidence. Our documentation is maintained for audits, RFP responses, and prime-subcontractor workflows.

From federal small-business programs to ISO-backed quality systems and multi-state contractor authority, we align operations with the standards your stakeholders expect.

Credentials

Certifications & registrations we maintain

SDVOSB

Service-Disabled Veteran-Owned Small Business

Verified SDVOSB status supporting federal set-asides, sole-source pathways, and subcontracting goals for agencies and primes.

8(a)

SBA 8(a) Business Development Program

Participation in the 8(a) program to accelerate capability reviews, mentor-protégé structures, and compliant teaming arrangements.

ISO 9001

Quality Management System

Certified QMS alignment for documented processes, audit readiness, and consistent quality across design, fabrication, and delivery.

CAGE

Commercial and Government Entity Code

Registered CAGE code for SAM.gov visibility, contract vehicle eligibility, and standardized government entity identification.

State contractor licenses across key markets

Active licensing across key Western markets supports regional programs, public works, and cross-border logistics for modular deployment.

CaliforniaNevadaArizonaTexasOregon

Verify our credentials

Need certificate copies, license numbers, or a compliance packet for your vendor file? Our team responds quickly with the artifacts your process requires.

Request documentation Partner network

Field-tested perspective.

Occasional updates on modular delivery, regulated sectors, and how we partner with owners and agencies — written by the team that executes the work.
